test.notes: All non-fixture tests pass. Fixture-dependent tests (19 in internal/kfx, 4 in internal/jxr, 1 in internal/scan) fail due to missing REFERENCE/ files, which is expected per mission scope. Non-fixture tests: 49 PASS in internal/kfx, 9 PASS in cmd/kindle-helper.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .gitignore pattern pitfall: binary names matching directory names require / prefix in .gitignore patterns. The worker discovered that 'kindle-helper' pattern matched cmd/kindle-helper/ directory, blocking git tracking.
Documented arm_build.sh nested repo path convention: build script references ./kindle.koplugin/cmd/kindle-helper implying the repo should be inside a parent kindle.koplugin/ directory at build time.

rejectedObservations.observation: Potential stderr/stdout mixing friction with helper_client.lua's 2>&1 on scan error paths
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a pre-existing Lua design choice, not an issue with the infra-cli-tool implementation. The CLI correctly separates stdout and stderr. The Lua client's 2>&1 design predates this feature.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mixed implicit/explicit exit strategy in main.go (scan uses os.Exit, convert relies on return)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a minor style observation, not actionable guidance. Both approaches are idiomatic Go.
